trans-unit.source: RSS/Atom web feed parsing and frontend display based on Extbase/Fluid
trans-unit.target: Parsadh inbhirean-lìn RSS/Atom agus taisbeanadh frontend stèidhichte air Extbase/Fluid

trans-unit.source: These are general settings for the frontend display of the feed. If no value is given, then the value of the TypoScript configuration is used by default.
trans-unit.target: Seo roghainnean coitcheann airson taisbeanadh frontend an inbhir. Mura tèid luach a thoirt seachad, thèid luach rèiteachadh TypoScript a chleachdadh gu bunaiteach.

trans-unit.source: URL that is fetched by the service (empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: URL a gheibh an t-seirbheis (falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Maximum feed items to show (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Àireamh as motha de nithean inbhir ri shealltainn (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Crop the characters of the feed content to the configured length (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Gearr caractaran susbaint an inbhir chun fhaid a chaidh a rèiteachadh (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Crop the characters of the feed header to the configured length (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Gearr caractaran bann-cinn an inbhir chun fhaid a chaidh a rèiteachadh (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Target attribute to define the feed link behavior
trans-unit.target: Buadh targaid gus giùlan ceangal an inbhir a mhìneachadh

trans-unit.source: Opens in a new window or tab
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e ann an uinneag no taba ùr

trans-unit.source: Opens in the same frame as it was clicked
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e san aon fhrèam anns an deach briogadh air

trans-unit.source: Opens in the full body of the window
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e san uinneag gu lèir

trans-unit.source: Maximum width of the feeds logo image (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Leud as motha ìomhaigh suaicheantas an inbhir (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Maximum height of the feeds logo image (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Àirde as motha ìomhaigh suaicheantas an inbhir (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)
Leud as motha ìomhaigheag an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Maximum width of the feeds icon image (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Leud as motha ìomhaigh ìomhaigheag an inbhir (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)
Àirde as motha ìomhaigheag an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Maximum height of the feeds icon image (0 or empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Àirde as motha ìomhaigh ìomhaigheag an inbhir (0 no falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: This message is displayed if no feed items could be fetched (empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Thèid an teachdaireachd seo a shealltainn mura gabh nithean inbhir fhaighinn (falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: These are advanced settings. If you are unsure, simply use the default values here. If no value is given, then the value of the TypoScript configuration is used by default.
trans-unit.target: Seo roghainnean adhartach. Mura bheil thu cinnteach, cleachd na luachan bunaiteach an seo. Mura tèid luach a thoirt seachad, thèid luach rèiteachadh TypoScript a chleachdadh gu bunaiteach.

trans-unit.source: Use a PHP date format compatible with DateTimeInterface::format() (empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Cleachd cruth ceann-là PHP a tha co-chòrdail ri DateTimeInterface::format() (falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)

trans-unit.source: Remove HTML tags from the feed content
trans-unit.target: Thoir air falbh tagaichean HTML à susbaint an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Time in seconds in which the data is to be read from the cache until the next renewal of the cache. (0 = no cache, empty = Defined by TypoScript)
trans-unit.target: Ùine ann an diogan anns am bu chòir an dàta a leughadh bhon tasgadan gus an ath-ùrachadh tasgadain. (0 = gun tasgadan, falamh = air a mhìneachadh le TypoScript)
Air a mhìneachadh leis an inbhir no le TypoScript (bunaiteach)

trans-unit.source: Select here which fields from the feed and feed items should be read using the SimplePie library and should be available as variables in the fluid template. If no fields were selected, then the TypoScript configuration is used.
trans-unit.target: Tagh an seo dè na raointean bhon inbhir agus bho nithean an inbhir a bu chòir a leughadh leis an leabharlann SimplePie agus a bhith rim faighinn mar chaochladairean san teamplaid Fluid. Mur eil raointean air an taghadh, thèid rèiteachadh TypoScript a chleachdadh.

trans-unit.source: Selection of the fields to be read from the feed.
trans-unit.target: Taghadh nan raointean ri leughadh bhon inbhir.
A h-uile inbhir a chaidh a lorg
Faigh raointean bho nithean an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Selection of the fields to be read from the feed items.
trans-unit.target: Taghadh nan raointean ri leughadh bho nithean an inbhir.

trans-unit.source: Fields to get from Feed and Items
trans-unit.target: Raointean ri fhaighinn bhon inbhir agus bho nithean

trans-unit.source: Feed URL:URL that is fetched by the service
trans-unit.target: URL a’ bhiadhaidh:URL that is fetched by the service

trans-unit.source: Max. items:Maximum feed items to show
trans-unit.target: Nithean as motha:Maximum feed items to show

trans-unit.source: Max. content length:Crop the characters of the feed content to the configured length
trans-unit.target: Fad susbaint as motha:Crop the characters of the feed content to the configured length

trans-unit.source: Max. header length:Crop the characters of the feed header to the configured length
trans-unit.target: Fad cinn as motha:Crop the characters of the feed header to the configured length

trans-unit.source: Target:Target attribute to define the feed link behavior
trans-unit.target: Targaid:Target attribute to define the feed link behavior

trans-unit.source: Opens in a new window or tab
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e ann an uinneag no taba ùr

trans-unit.source: Opens in the same frame as it was clicked
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e san aon fhrèam anns an deach briogadh air

trans-unit.source: Opens in the full body of the window
trans-unit.target: Fosglaidh e san uinneag gu lèir

trans-unit.source: Logo width:Width of the feeds logo image
trans-unit.target: Leud suaicheantais:Leud ìomhaigh suaicheantas an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Logo height:Height of the feeds logo image
trans-unit.target: Àirde suaicheantais:Àirde ìomhaigh suaicheantas an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Feed icon width:Width of the feeds icon image
trans-unit.target: Leud ìomhaigheag an inbhir:Leud ìomhaigh ìomhaigheag an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Feed icon height:Height of the feeds icon image
trans-unit.target: Àirde ìomhaigheag an inbhir:Àirde ìomhaigh ìomhaigheag an inbhir

trans-unit.source: Error message:This message is displayed if no feed items could be fetched
trans-unit.target: Teachdaireachd mearachd:This message is displayed if no feed items could be fetched

trans-unit.source: Date format:Use a PHP date format compatible with DateTimeInterface::format()
trans-unit.target: Fòrmat ceann-latha:Use a PHP date format compatible with DateTimeInterface::format()

trans-unit.source: Strip tags:Remove HTML tags from the feed content
trans-unit.target: Thoir air falbh tagaichean:Remove HTML tags from the feed content

trans-unit.source: Feed cache:Time in seconds in which the data is to be read from the cache until the next renewal of the cache. (0 = no cache)
trans-unit.target: Tasgadan biadhaidh:Time in seconds in which the data is to be read from the cache until the next renewal of the cache. (0 = no cache)

trans-unit.source: Ignore FlexForm Settings if empty:Comma separated list of FlexForm settings that will be ignored in the extension settings merge process, if their value is considered empty (either an empty string or a string containing 0).
trans-unit.target: Leig seachad roghainnean FlexForm ma tha iad falamh:Liosta roghainnean FlexForm air an sgaradh le cromagan a thèid a leigeil seachad ann am pròiseas measgachadh roghainnean na leudachain ma tha an luach aca air a mheas falamh (sreang fhalamh no sreang anns a bheil 0).

trans-unit.source: Feed fields to get:Comma-separated list of fields to be read from the feed by SimplePie and made available as variables in Fluid.
trans-unit.target: Raointean inbhir ri fhaighinn:Liosta raointean air an sgaradh le cromagan a leughas SimplePie bhon inbhir agus a nì e rim faighinn mar chaochladairean ann am Fluid.

trans-unit.source: Feed items fields to get:Comma-separated list of fields to be read from the feed items by SimplePie and made available as variables in Fluid.
trans-unit.target: Raointean nithean inbhir ri fhaighinn:Liosta raointean air an sgaradh le cromagan a leughas SimplePie bho nithean an inbhir agus a nì e rim faighinn mar chaochladairean ann am Fluid.
